title: Create a new goal with all required details
description: This test verifies that an employee can complete the goal creation form, satisfy validation rules, and submit a new goal for approval.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals/create
Fill in a goal title
Select a thrust area
Select a unit of measure
Fill in a valid target value
Fill in a valid goal weight
Fill in success criteria details
Submit the form for approval
Verify a submission success confirmation is visible
Verify the new goal is available for review

title: Submit a quarterly check-in update
description: This test verifies that an employee can switch the period, enter progress data, choose a status, and submit the check-in update.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkins
Toggle to a different quarter period
Enter a valid actual progress value
Choose a current track status
Submit the update
Verify the submitted update confirmation is visible
Verify the check-in entry is displayed

title: Save a quarterly check-in draft
description: This test verifies that an employee can switch the period, enter progress data, choose a status, and save the check-in as a draft.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkins
Toggle to a different quarter period
Enter a valid actual progress value
Choose a current track status
Save the draft
Verify the saved draft confirmation is visible
Verify the entered progress update is displayed

title: Review assigned goals and allocation balance
description: This test verifies that an employee can open the goals sheet, review allocation balance indicators, and see assigned goals with their details.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Scroll to the goals allocation summary section
Verify allocation balance indicators are displayed
Verify assigned goal cards are displayed

title: Approve submitted goals in a batch
description: A manager can expand a team member’s accordion, select approvals, and complete the batch action for submitted goals.

steps.description: Navigate to /manager/approvals
Click an employee section to expand their submissions
Select the submitted goals to approve
Submit the approval action
Verify an approval confirmation is visible
Verify the submission is no longer pending approval

title: Review pending approvals and act on a team goal batch
description: This test verifies that a manager can open approvals, review an employee goal accordion, and approve or return a submitted batch after checking the weight validity state.

steps.description: Navigate to /manager/approvals
Expand an employee review accordion
Review the submitted goal sheet
Approve the batch or return it for changes
Verify an approval decision confirmation is visible
Verify the review state updates in the approvals list

title: Review team submissions in an expanded accordion
description: A manager can open a team member’s accordion on the approvals page and inspect the submitted goals and their weight details.

steps.description: Navigate to /manager/approvals
Click an employee section to expand their submissions
Verify the employee submission details are displayed
Verify goal weight information is displayed

title: Return submitted goals in a batch
description: A manager can expand a team member’s accordion, select returns, and complete the batch action for submitted goals.

steps.description: Navigate to /manager/approvals
Click an employee section to expand their submissions
Select the submitted goals to return
Submit the return action
Verify a return confirmation is visible
Verify the submission is marked as returned

title: Inspect reporting summaries and export the CSV report
description: This test verifies that a manager or admin can review the reports dashboard and export the CSV report.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Review the reporting summary area
Inspect the report charts and tables
Export the CSV report
Verify reporting summaries are displayed
Verify the CSV export action completes successfully

title: Review reporting summaries and trends
description: A user can open the reporting dashboard and inspect the summary metrics, charts, and table-based performance trends.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Verify reporting summary metrics are displayed
Verify reporting trend charts and tables are displayed

title: Confirm goal sheet shows valid allocation status
description: This test verifies that an employee can review the overall allocation summary and see whether the sheet is valid.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Verify the allocation summary is displayed
Verify the overall weightage status is displayed

title: Export the reporting CSV
description: A user can export the reporting data and receive the CSV export action from the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Export the report as CSV
Verify the CSV export action completes successfully
Verify a report export confirmation is visible

title: Block goal creation when required details are incomplete
description: This test verifies that an employee cannot submit an incomplete goal form and receives validation feedback instead.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals/create
Fill in a goal title
Select a thrust area
Submit the form for approval
Verify required field validation feedback is visible
Verify the form remains open for correction

title: Block approval when total weight is invalid
description: A manager sees that approval is unavailable when a team member’s submitted goal weights do not total correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to /manager/approvals
Click an employee section to expand their submissions
Verify invalid weight information is displayed
Verify approval is unavailable

title: Expand a goal card to review details
description: This test verifies that an employee can expand a goal card and view the detailed target information for that goal.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Expand an assigned goal card
Verify the goal details are displayed
Verify the goal target information is displayed

title: View cycle completion status
description: An admin can switch to the completion tracker tab and review cycle completion information.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/cycles
Click the Completion Tracker tab
Verify cycle completion status is displayed
Verify the completion tracker panel is active

title: View audit trail entries
description: An admin can switch to the audit trail tab and review cycle audit log entries.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/cycles
Click the Audit Trail tab
Verify audit trail entries are displayed
Verify the audit trail panel is active

title: Block goal creation when weightage is below the minimum
description: This test verifies that an employee sees validation feedback when a goal is given weightage below the allowed minimum.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals/create
Fill in a goal title
Select a thrust area
Select a unit of measure
Fill in a valid target value
Fill in a weight below the minimum threshold
Submit the form for approval
Verify a weightage validation error is visible

title: Review cycle audit trail and completion tracker
description: This test verifies that an admin can switch between cycle oversight tabs and inspect cycle status and completion information.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/cycles
Switch to the audit trail tab
Switch to the completion tracker tab
Verify audit trail information is displayed
Verify completion tracker information is displayed

title: Switch between cycle tabs and see the active view update
description: An admin can move between cycle tabs and see the visible panel change to match the selected tab.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/cycles
Click the Audit Trail tab
Click the Completion Tracker tab
Verify the completion tracker content is displayed
Verify the audit trail content is no longer active

title: View zero-based progress calculation
description: This test verifies that entering an actual value for a zero-based metric shows the calculated progress result.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkins
Select a zero-based metric
Enter an actual value for the metric
Verify the calculated progress result is displayed
Verify the metric update remains visible
